channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Texas Gains Bipartisan Support in App Store Legal Battle
item.description: A bipartisan group of 27 state attorneys general has asked the Supreme Court to back Texas' App Store Accountability Act, claiming the law is a necessary...

item.title: Mamdani's Anti-American Outburst: Oligarchs, ICE, and 'Supremacy' on America 250
America's 250th Birthday Celebrated with Fireworks and Heat
item.description: The 250th anniversary of American independence coincides with political polarization and a heat wave affecting millions across the country.
